calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

David P. Wasserman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff 2004 GIOVANNI & YVONNE TORACCA TRUST.
Witness GIOVANNI TORACCA sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants DAVID EDOUARD CARBONELL, AN INDIVIDUAL, and UN FIL A LA PATTE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial, Certificate of Mailing
2-Lease Agreement
3-Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit, Proof of Service
Court returned exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1314 Grant Avenue, City and County of San Francisco, California 94133.
Damages $2000.00
Holdover damages $2,399.94
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $475.00
For a Total Judgment of $4874.94

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Assigned To Trial Court
